creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:

Fix: The problem is the control.h. This header have changed name in: mediacontrol.h.
This header is declared in modules/control/corba/corba.c. The control.h header
have to declared after the vlc.h header.

This is the patch:

How-To-Repeat: Set WITH_CORBA=yes and copile vlc.
